resources.string: Connect to Auto before playing music
Load a queue in Power Ampache 2 to start casting your music
Open Power Ampache 2 on your phone
go to Plugin menu, tap Android Auto
This app works as a companion to Power Ampache 2. It provides your music library to Android Auto on your car\'s head unit.

The plugin should connect automatically, unless the main app is not running or it's been killed by the system.
Re-opening Power Ampache 2 on your phone will force a fresh sync
1. Open the side menu, go to Plugin
2. Tap Android Auto to start data sharing

Note: The host app must stay running while using Android Auto. The Plugin menu starts a foreground service that keeps the data exchange alive. If you swipe that notification away, you might lose Auto connection after a while.
